_comment: Symbols we do NOT have a SECURITY_ID_MAP id for but want one. The scrip-master clerk looks each up weekly and reports the candidate rows (exact NSE trading-symbol match only — never a fuzzy guess). Add a symbol here instead of hand-searching a 27MB CSV.

_notes.GOLDBEES: Blocks the wealth-flywheel merge: wealth_lock stays an advisory LEDGER until this id is scrip-master-verified (ARCHITECTURE.md staged-merge note, the Issue-15 lesson).
